outputs.source_intake_manifest: Accepted one synthetic approved source reference under source_scope_binding and approved_source_policy. Intake is metadata-only: source identity, approval status, scope fit, and handling constraints are recorded without payload text, private hashes, runtime paths, or copied source content.
outputs.sourcebound_knowledge_packet_manifest: Created a synthetic packet manifest for the bounded knowledge_packet_scope. Packet contents remain source-bound and below canon authority. Manifest records one source ref, one contradiction gap, one concept candidate, and the applicable claim ceiling.
outputs.compiled_projection_index: Indexed one private compiled projection placeholder as a derived working view of the approved source. The index records projection purpose, source linkage, and boundary status only; it does not expose extracted text, source payloads, private evidence, or runtime locations.
outputs.compiled_projection_log: Logged that the projection pass produced one bounded synthesis item and surfaced one contradiction gap. The log treats projection as working analysis, not accepted truth, canon material, or promotion-ready authority.
outputs.contradiction_gap_lint_report: Detected one contradiction gap in the synthetic packet: the approved source supports a scoped observation, but the projected interpretation leaves an unresolved mismatch or missing condition. Status: unresolved; action: retain as gap and block stronger claims until separately reviewed.
outputs.concept_candidate_register: Registered one concept candidate derived from the approved source and projection pass. Candidate status: provisional. It may be routed for later review as a reusable concept pattern, but it is not ontology canon, workflow canon, class canon, or source truth.
outputs.claim_ceiling_and_promotion_route: Claim ceiling remains below canon authority. Permitted claim: synthetic source-bound candidate with one unresolved contradiction gap. Prohibited claim: accepted canon, verified ontology, production workflow rule, or owner-approved truth. Promotion route requires separate review under promotion_policy.
outputs.knowledge_package_archive_manifest: Archive manifest records metadata-only package readiness for bounded backup or handoff. Archive presence, sync, or upload does not approve source truth, promote canon, resolve gaps, or expand authority beyond the declared archive policy.
outputs.optional_notebooklm_advisory_handoff: Optional advisory handoff may include metadata-only bookshelf preparation: source ref label, packet scope, unresolved gap summary, and question prompts. Any advisory answer remains context only and cannot approve, reject, or promote the packet.
outputs.notebooklm_handoff_validation: Validation result: handoff is allowed only as advisory preparation metadata. It must not include private payloads, hidden evidence, copied source text, runtime paths, or claims of acceptance authority.
outputs.ontology_candidate_rule_register: One ontology candidate rule is registered as a review candidate only: reusable relation or concept pattern may exist, but unresolved contradiction and claim ceiling prevent ontology promotion. Status: candidate pending separate authority.
outputs.workflowization_review_packet: Workflowization packet records that this synthetic run exercises the source-bound loop stages: intake, projection, lint, candidate extraction, claim ceiling, archive metadata, advisory handoff validation, and boundary review. Status supports calibration comparison only, not upstream mutation.
outputs.boundary_review_note: Public-safe synthetic boundary preserved. No tool use, file edits, runtime paths, hidden refs, private evidence, upstream mutation, canon promotion, or stronger authority are claimed.

provenance: Synthetic workflow contract supplied in the prompt.
Synthetic scenario facts supplied in the prompt: one approved source ref, one contradiction gap, one concept candidate, and one below-canon claim ceiling.
gaps: One contradiction gap remains unresolved and blocks stronger promotion claims.
No private/raw evidence, source payload, runtime verification, or owner acceptance is available under the public-safe synthetic boundary.
downstream_handoff: Route provisional concept candidate to separate promotion review only if policy allows and source-bound evidence can be reviewed in the proper private context.
Carry the contradiction gap forward as an unresolved blocker for canon, ontology, or workflow authority.
boundary_review_note: No upstream artifacts were mutated or promoted.
Output is metadata-only and public-safe within the synthetic contract.
no_claims: No claim of tool execution, file editing, runtime path inspection, hidden reference access, or private/raw evidence review.
No claim that archive presence, advisory handoff, or packet creation proves truth or grants canon authority.
